Class AbstractStructure

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.structure.AbstractStructure
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ReadableStructure
Direct Known Subclasses:
Structure, UnownedStructure
public abstract class AbstractStructure extends Object implements ReadableStructure, HasClient
